name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
Iridescent silver in stock!!️
Lady latest micro series, one that can't fit anything, can only fit a cute little bag😘, made with soft lambskin, iconic letter hardware buckle, exquisite bag shape👏🏻, simple and stylish and versatile, small capacity, can only fit lipstick, car keys, and can also serve as a card holder🤗
size:12*10*5cm
